cases.title: Register when full and waitlist enabled assigns Waitlisted per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is in RegistrationOpen state with waitlistEnabled true
Registered participant count equals EventCapacity (event is full)
Registration window is active
New participant has no active registration for the event
steps: Invoke registrationService.register(eventId, participantId, actorContext) for a participant with no prior registration
Read the returned registration entity snapshot and waitlist entry if present
cases.expected: Registration is created with state Waitlisted, waitlistPosition is a positive integer (1 for first entrant), and Registered count remains at EventCapacity without overflow (testing-plan §3: Register when full + waitlist enabled → Waitlisted)

cases.title: POST registrations returns HTTP 200 with Waitlisted envelope when full
preconditions: Published event with registration opened, capacity 1, waitlistEnabled true
One participant already Registered consuming the sole seat
Second participant has valid JWT and no active registration
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations as the second participant with Authorization bearer token and Idempotency-Key header
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registration-status for the same participant
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with body containing registrationId, eventId, participantId, state Waitlisted, waitlistPosition 1, reasonCode null, and updatedAt; GET registration-status returns the same registration with state Waitlisted and matching waitlistPosition

cases.title: Participant sees Waitlisted status with queue position in UI
preconditions: Event visible on participant discovery with registration open, full capacity, and waitlist enabled
Participant logged in with no existing registration for the event
At least one other participant already Registered
steps: Navigate to event detail page for the full event with waitlist enabled
Click register (or equivalent primary registration action)
Observe registration status area on event detail and/or my registrations list
cases.expected: UI shows Waitlisted status with understandable queue position text (for example position number or 'in queue') without implying a confirmed seat; status is consistent with API registration-status

cases.title: Waitlist enqueue persists atomically with registration in one transaction
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled true
Database transaction boundaries enabled for registration module
New participant with no active registration
steps: Complete registrationService.register assigning Waitlisted state
Query registration row and waitlist_entries row in the same database session
cases.expected: Registration row exists with state Waitlisted and corresponding waitlist_entries record with matching position; both committed atomically per cross-module transaction boundary for registration assignment + waitlist handling

cases.title: Flow B waitlist entry step yields Waitlisted before cancellation and promotion
preconditions: E2E fixture: published event with capacity 1 and waitlistEnabled true
First participant Registered consuming the sole seat
Second participant token and fresh idempotency key
steps: Execute Flow B step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations for second participant after event is full
Verify registration state before proceeding to cancellation/promotion steps
cases.expected: Registration response state is Waitlisted with waitlistPosition 1, enabling subsequent Flow B cancellation and auto-promotion steps

cases.title: OrganizerAdmin and OrganizerStaff denied POST registrations on full waitlist-enabled event
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen, full capacity, waitlistEnabled true
Valid JWT for OrganizerAdmin (or OrganizerStaff scoped to the event)
Actor has no participant registration for the event
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with OrganizerAdmin bearer token and Idempotency-Key
Repeat POST with OrganizerStaff bearer token for the same event
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 unauthorized; no registration row is created; Register for event capability is Participant-only per roles-permissions matrix

cases.title: Concurrent registrations when full assign excess participants to Waitlisted without capacity overflow
preconditions: Event capacity 1, waitlistEnabled true, one Registered participant
Multiple distinct participants attempt registration concurrently (parallel requests)
Each participant has no prior active registration
steps: Fire concurrent registrationService.register calls from M participants while event is full
Aggregate results and query Registered count
cases.expected: Exactly zero additional Registered assignments beyond capacity; each concurrent entrant receives Waitlisted with unique sequential waitlistPosition; Registered count never exceeds EventCapacity

cases.title: Registration at exact capacity boundary waitlists the next participant
preconditions: Event capacity 2, waitlistEnabled true, zero Registered participants
Three authenticated participants (P1, P2, P3) with no active registrations
steps: POST registrations for P1 and P2 until capacity is filled
POST registration for P3
Verify P1 and P2 responses and P3 response
cases.expected: P1 and P2 receive state Registered; P3 receives state Waitlisted with waitlistPosition 1; no fourth Registered seat is created

cases.title: queueWaitlist transition moves Requested to Waitlisted when full and waitlist enabled
preconditions: Registration intake begins in Requested state
registeredCount equals EventCapacity
waitlistEnabled is true
Registration window open and no duplicate active registration
steps: Execute queueWaitlist transition via registration module pipeline
Read registration beforeState and afterState
cases.expected: beforeState is Requested and afterState is Waitlisted; transition permitted only when full and waitlist enabled per state machine table

cases.title: Full event with waitlist disabled rejects registration instead of Waitlisted
preconditions: Event capacity 1, waitlistEnabled false, one Registered participant
Second participant authenticated with no active registration
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations as the second participant
cases.expected: HTTP 422 or 409 with error code REGISTRATION_REJECTED_FULL; response state is not Waitlisted; no waitlist entry created; contrasts with AC-02 waitlist-enabled path

cases.title: Multiple waitlist entrants receive FIFO positions by enqueue order
preconditions: Event capacity 1, waitlistEnabled true, one Registered participant
Three distinct participants with no active registration
Fixed clock or sequential registration calls to establish deterministic enqueue order
steps: Register participant A, then B, then C while event remains full
Read waitlistPosition for each Waitlisted registration
cases.expected: Participant A receives waitlistPosition 1, B receives 2, C receives 3; ordering matches FIFO by timestamp (BR-04); all three have state Waitlisted

cases.title: Organizer GET waitlist includes newly waitlisted participant with correct position
preconditions: Event full with waitlistEnabled true and at least one Waitlisted participant
Organizer Admin JWT with scope for the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/waitlist?page=1&pageSize=20 with organizer Authorization
Locate the waitlisted participant in items
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items include the waitlisted participant sorted by position ascending (default sort position:asc); item reflects Waitlisted registration consistent with participant-facing registration-status
